markdownTwin.azureRegion.markdownDescrip: Azure Region for Azure Translator. **[Only used when Active Provider is Azure Translator (microsoft)]** (e.g. global, japaneast, eastus, eastasia).
markdownTwin.defaultMode.description: Default display mode when translation is toggled on.
markdownTwin.batchSize.description: Number of blocks to translate per batch.
markdownTwin.debounceDelay.description: Delay in seconds before re-translating after document changes (1-10s). Increase to reduce API requests when typing.
markdownTwin.configuration.title: Markdown Twin
